findings.title: Define Notification Prioritization Criteria
findings.description: Establish clear criteria for how notifications will be prioritized using machine learning algorithms.
assumptions: The prioritization criteria will be based on user engagement and context.

evidence.excerpt: No customer-facing data available for analysis.

recommendations: Conduct user interviews to gather insights on notification preferences.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a set of user engagement metrics, WHEN the prioritization criteria are applied, THEN notifications should be ranked according to their relevance score.

findings.title: Implement Machine Learning Model for Prioritization
findings.description: Develop and integrate a machine learning model that can analyze user behavior and prioritize notifications accordingly.
assumptions: The model will require historical data to train effectively.

evidence.excerpt: No metrics data available for analysis.

recommendations: Gather historical user interaction data for model training.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a trained machine learning model, WHEN it processes user data, THEN it should output prioritized notifications with a confidence score.
metadata.story_title: Integrate ML Model for Notification Prioritization

findings.title: User Feedback Mechanism for Notification Relevance
findings.description: Create a feedback mechanism that allows users to rate the relevance of notifications, which will help refine the ML model.
assumptions: Users will be willing to provide feedback on notifications.

evidence.excerpt: No customer-facing data available for analysis.

recommendations: Design a simple feedback interface for users.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification displayed to the user, WHEN the user provides feedback, THEN the feedback should be recorded and associated with the notification for future analysis.
metadata.story_title: Implement User Feedback for Notification Relevance

findings.title: Monitoring and Alerting for Notification Performance
findings.description: Set up monitoring and alerting systems to track the performance of the notification prioritization system.
assumptions: Monitoring tools will be integrated with the notification system.

evidence.excerpt: No metrics data available for analysis.

recommendations: Select appropriate monitoring tools for system performance.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification prioritization system is live, WHEN performance metrics are collected, THEN alerts should trigger if performance falls below defined thresholds.
metadata.story_title: Implement Monitoring and Alerting for Notification System

findings.title: Documentation for Notification Prioritization System
findings.description: Create comprehensive documentation for the notification prioritization system, including user guides and technical specifications.
assumptions: Documentation will be necessary for user onboarding and system maintenance.

evidence.excerpt: No customer-facing data available for analysis.

recommendations: Draft user and technical documentation as features are developed.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification prioritization system is developed, WHEN documentation is created, THEN it should cover all aspects of system functionality and user interaction.
metadata.story_title: Create Documentation for Notification Prioritization System

summary: The analysis resulted in the creation of a structured backlog for a notification prioritization system using machine learning. Requirements include defining prioritization criteria, implementing an ML model, establishing user feedback mechanisms, and setting up monitoring systems. Each requirement is linked to upstream findings and includes detailed acceptance criteria, priorities, and dependencies.
